known_issues: Error page persists when creating a paste after deployment of Version 14

existing_features.title: Investigate and fix the persistent error page that appears after attempting to create a paste, despite Version 14 deployment addressing the previous error

Add comprehensive error logging to the paste creation flow in useQueries.ts to capture the exact error occurring during paste creation, including backend error details, network failures, and response data
Ensure the frontend properly handles the paste creation response and correctly constructs the redirect URL using the returned paste ID

new_feature_requests.summary: Verify that the backend createPaste method correctly returns paste IDs and handles all edge cases including file uploads, password protection, and expiration settings

projectName: Fix persistent error page after paste creation
